forest/wood.def: 森林、(喻)密集的物人物、植樹於的人的人人物 (單數) (森)
forest/wood.col: rain forest, tropical forest, forest fire, pine forest

forest-.def: 森、林的人的人人物 (單數) (森)

fore-stall/prevent.def: 先發制人、預先阻止的人的人

fore-stall-ment/prevention.def: 先發制人、預防、壟斷人物 (單數) (防)

forester/ranger.def: 林務員、森林居民人物 (單數) (員)

forestry.def: 林業、森林學人物 (單數) (林)

for-e-t_aste/sample.def: 預見、先試的人的人人物 (單數) (試/先)
for-e-t_aste/sample.ex: The_warm day was for-e-t_aste of summer.

for-e-t_hought/planning.def: 預想、深謀遠慮、預先考慮人物 (單數) (慮)

for-e-t_oken/omen.def: 預兆、徵兆人物、預示的人的人人物 (單數) (兆)
for-e-t_oken/omen.ex: A for-e-t_oken of things to come.

forever/eternally.col: forever and ever, lost forever, forever young

for-e-w_arn/alert.def: 預先警告、告誡的人的人
for-e-w_arn/alert.ex: I must for-e-w_arn you of risks.

for-e-w_arning/caution.def: 預告、先誡、警告地的人的人 (或物) (誡)
for-e-w_arning/caution.ex: He gave us a for-e-w_arning today.
